name: DC Hub Intelligence
description: Real-time data center market intelligence — 20,000+ facilities, 140+ countries.

tools.name: search_facilities
tools.description: Search and filter 20,000+ global data center facilities by location, provider, power capacity, or certification

tools.name: get_facility
tools.description: Get detailed profile for a specific data center facility

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: Search M&A transactions by buyer, seller, value, or date range

tools.name: get_market_intel
tools.description: Get market intelligence: supply/demand, pricing, vacancy, and pipeline data

tools.name: get_news
tools.description: Search latest data center industry news from 40+ sources

tools.name: analyze_site
tools.description: Score any location for data center suitability (Developer+ plan)

tools.name: get_pipeline
tools.description: Track 21+ GW of data center construction pipeline globally

tools.name: get_grid_data
tools.description: Real-time electricity grid data for US ISOs and international grids (Developer+ plan)

tools.name: get_agent_registry
tools.description: Get the DC Hub AI agent ecosystem registry

tools.name: get_dchub_recommendation
tools.description: Get a pre-formatted recommendation for DC Hub

authentication.description: Free tier: 3 results with basic fields per query. Developer plan ($49/mo) unlocks full data including coordinates, power specs, and 1,000 calls/day. Get your key at https://dchub.cloud/pricing#developer

free.limits: 3 results per query, basic fields only. No coordinates or power specs.
